name: Engineers’ Consortium
summary: Primary infrastructure planners and maintainers for Titan Towers, spans, depots, and industrial systems.
motive: Keep the Alliance physically functional and expansion-capable through disciplined engineering.
power_relations: Serves the Giant Council and regional managers
Relies on miners, artificers, and transport clans
current_pressure: need to maintain expansion without catastrophic failure
visible_membership_base: Engineers, surveyors, draft clerks, maintenance crews, giant overseers.
current_tension_or_vulnerability: Public trust depends on their competence, so visible failure quickly becomes political and spiritual embarrassment.
